afterFileEdit.name: chromatic-diff-hint
afterFileEdit.command: echo 'Story changed — run `pnpm chromatic` before opening a PR.'

beforeShellExecution.name: block-destructive
beforeShellExecution.command: echo '${command}' | grep -Eq 'rm -rf|git push --force|pnpm publish' && exit 1 || exit 0

afterShellExecution.name: rebuild-storybook-hint
afterShellExecution.command: echo 'Rebuild Storybook with `pnpm build-storybook` before the next Chromatic run.'
